summary: Library Phase B / iteration-23 backend verification — Party Master 7-sheet template, output-kind file_type 'msme43bh_creditor_report_xlsx', upload rejection of output kinds, and Library integration across all 5 migrated modules (Balance Confirmation, Fixed Assets, GST Recon, FS Designer, MSME 43BH). Wrote /app/backend/tests/test_library_phase_b_live.py (10 tests). Combined run: 10/10 new + 11/11 Phase A regression + 9/9 Clause 44 R3.2 regression = 30/30 passed.

verified.catalog_14_types: GET /api/library/catalog returns 14 file_types; msme43bh_creditor_report_xlsx present with kind='output'.
verified.party_master_template: GET /api/library/clients/{cid}/template/party_master_xlsx?period=2023-24 returns sheets [README, Trade Payables, Trade Receivables, Unsecured Loans, Bank Accounts, Others, MSME Details]. MSME Details has 3 data validations: Sector ('Manufacturing,Services,Trading'), MSME Type ('Micro,Small,Medium'), Capital Goods ('Yes,No') — each scoped to D3:D71/E3:E71/F3:F71. Pre-req: books_json + ledger_mapping_xlsx must be uploaded first (else 409 'Ledger Mapping XLSX must be uploaded first.' / similar — expected gating, not a bug).
verified.upload_rejection_of_output_kind: POST /api/library/upload with file_type=msme43bh_creditor_report_xlsx → HTTP 400 with detail 'AssureAI MSME 43B(h) Creditor Report is auto-generated by a utility; it cannot be uploaded directly.'
verified.status_includes_output_chip_pre_compute: GET /api/library/clients/{cid}/status?period=2023-24 returns msme43bh_creditor_report_xlsx in files[] with kind='output' and uploaded=false before any 43BH compute.
verified.balance_confirmation_integration: POST /api/balance-confirmation/runs/{rid}/upload-books → books_json saved to Library v1, run pinned_files={'books_json': <file_id>}. GET /runs/{rid} returns library_status.module_key='balance_confirmation' with dependencies array. POST /runs/{rid}/rerun re-pins to latest Library version (verified by mutating the JSON content → v2 → rerun returns pinned_books_file_id == v2.file_id).
verified.fixed_assets_integration: POST /api/fixed-assets/runs/{rid}/ingest-books succeeds; GET /runs/{rid} returns library_status.module_key='fixed_assets' with dependencies array; pinned_files contains books_json.
verified.gst_recon_integration: POST /api/gst-recon/runs/{rid}/files with a Tally-style books JSON (filename matching `\d{8}-\d{8}` so it sniffs as books bucket) saves the JSON to Library + pins. GET /runs/{rid} returns library_status.module_key='gst_recon' with dependencies array; pinned_files['books_json'] populated.
verified.fs_designer_get_run_library_status: POST /api/fin-statement/runs creates a draft; GET /runs/{rid} returns library_status.module_key='fin_statement' with dependencies array (smoke; full ingest path not exercised — see notes).
verified.msme_compute_auto_persists_creditor_repo: POST /api/msme/sessions/{sid}/compute (after yearend XLSX upload) auto-saves the AssureAI 43Bh Audit XLSX into Library as msme43bh_creditor_report_xlsx (kind=output) v1. GET /api/library/clients/{cid}/status?period=2023-24 then shows uploaded=true with version_no >= 1 and kind='output'.
verified.phase_a_regression: All 11 tests in /app/backend/tests/test_library_phase_a_live.py still pass — catalog count update from 13→14 already in place; rerun + outdated-detection + soft-delete pin gate all functional.

critical_code_review_comments: library/templates.py — Party Master generator gates on books_json + ledger_mapping_xlsx and surfaces a clean 409 when missing; sensible UX (forces auditor to seed party list first).
library/controller.py upload — kind=output rejection (400) at the right layer; prevents auditors from accidentally uploading a generated report.

msme43bh/controller.py compute_session — Library save uses lib_svc.create_file_version directly (NOT save_and_pin) for the output kind; pinning is correctly limited to the source dependencies (books_json, party_master_xlsx). Defensive 'Failed to auto-save' try/except keeps compute itself non-fatal if Library write hiccups.
fin_statement/controller.py FsRunOut(extra='allow') — required so attached library_status passes the response_model validation. Reasonable trade-off vs. expanding the Pydantic schema.
gst_recon/controller.py upload_batch — Library save fires only when integrity_ok=True on the books bucket, so a corrupt JSON won't pollute the Library.

fixed_assets/controller.py ingest-books — Library save runs BEFORE the FA-detection 400 ('No Fixed Asset ledgers found') so Library state is consistent with whatever the auditor uploaded; downstream module shows fresh-but-empty rather than missing.

balance_confirmation/controller.py rerun — re-pins to lib_svc.get_current_file and re-parses; auditor manual edits (email, category, response_token, confirmation_status) are correctly carried over via the existing build_ledger_records merge in upload_books. Verified by inspection (live rerun test only checks pin update; manual-edit preservation is exercised in the existing BC phase tests).
test_credentials: Conftest bootstraps a fresh user+session via mongosh on test_database; tokens are session-scoped. Manual checks also done with cookie session_token=qa_test_session_token_20260430_dev (admin qa-bot@transformautomations.com) — both work.
seed_data_creation: Each test module creates one isolated client with file_number prefix 'FIXTURE_LIBB_' (auto-cleaned by conftest session-end hook). MSME compute test seeds 2 yearend bills via an in-memory openpyxl workbook (no payments → fully disallowed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) Always export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://unified-tax-tools.preview.emergentagent.com before invoking pytest — conftest.BASE_URL has a wrong default ('https://form3cd-pro.preview.emergentagent.com') that will cause every live test to 404. Worth fixing in conftest by reading from /app/frontend/.env directly. 2) Phase B suite at /app/backend/tests/test_library_phase_b_live.py is the regression for iteration 23. 3) FS Designer ingest with a real FinalStatement JSON wasn't exercised end-to-end (test only validates GET /runs/{rid} library_status); a future iteration should add a minimal valid FinalStatement fixture and assert library_status.dependencies['books_json'].status == 'fresh' after ingest. 4) FA ingest on the synthetic books fixture currently returns 400 'No Fixed Asset ledgers found' on this client — expected; Library save still happens BEFORE that gate so pinned_files is populated.
rca of the issue: n/a — no defects found in this iteration.
